mq9
Main Navigation WhatFor AgentFor EngineerGitHub

Appearance

AI Infrastructure

Agent A sends a message.
Agent B is offline.
The message waits.

mq9 is a communication layer for AI Agents — async mailbox, broadcast, priority queue. Built on NATS. No new SDK. Any NATS client connects directly.

Learn the designQuick start →
Agent A
INBOX.mail-001.normal
✉
Mailbox
stored
when online
Agent B
01

What

Why Agents need a different communication layer. The design decisions behind four commands that cover every async scenario.

Read the design →
02

For Agent

Written for AI Agents. How to create a mailbox, send messages, receive tasks, broadcast events, handle being offline.

Agent manual →
03

For Engineer

Integration guide for humans. Code examples in Python, Go, and JavaScript. Eight real-world patterns. Deployment options.

Engineer's guide →
Four commands. Any scenario.
MAILBOX.CREATEMAILBOX.QUERYINBOX.{mail_id}.{priority}BROADCAST.{domain}.{event}

Built on RobustMQ
